query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS purchase_requests (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  requestNumber VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  requesterId INT NOT NULL,
  departmentId INT NOT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT NOT NULL,
  category ENUM('software', 'equipment', 'supplies', 'professional_development', 'travel', 'contractor', 'subscription', 'other') NOT NULL,
  vendor VARCHAR(255),
  amount DECIMAL(12, 2) NOT NULL,
  budgetCode VARCHAR(50),
  fiscalYear VARCHAR(10),
  approvalTier ENUM('tier1', 'tier2', 'tier3') NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('draft', 'pending_manager', 'pending_procurement', 'pending_finance', 'pending_ceo', 'pending_board_notification', 'approved', 'rejected', 'cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
  managerApproval ENUM('pending', 'approved', 'rejected') DEFAULT 'pending',
  managerApprovedBy INT,
  managerApprovedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  managerNotes TEXT,
  procurementApproval ENUM('pending', 'approved', 'rejected') DEFAULT 'pending',
  procurementApprovedBy INT,
  procurementApprovedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  procurementNotes TEXT,
  financeApproval ENUM('pending', 'approved', 'rejected') DEFAULT 'pending',
  financeApprovedBy INT,
  financeApprovedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  financeNotes TEXT,
  ceoApproval ENUM('not_required', 'pending', 'approved', 'rejected') DEFAULT 'not_required',
  ceoApprovedBy INT,
  ceoApprovedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ceoNotes TEXT,
  boardNotified BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  boardNotifiedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  attachments JSON,
  submittedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  completedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
command:

  managerApproval ENUM('pending', 'approved', 'rejected') DEFAULT 'pending',
